zh.lifeSummary: 當Sara Samuelsdotter於1440年出生在瑞典額斯特格特藍德林可平時，她的父親Samuel Samuelsson25歲，母親Anna Maria Johnsdotter19歲。她於1452年與John Wyllie在英國英格蘭賀特福爾利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1513年5月24日在英國英格蘭波藍德卡萊爾享年73歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sara Samuelsdotter于1440年出生在瑞典額斯特格特藍德林可平时，她的父亲Samuel Samuelsson25岁，母亲Anna Maria Johnsdotter19岁。她于1452年与John Wyllie在英国英格兰賀特福爾利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1513年5月24日在英国英格兰波藍德卡萊爾享年73岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪。

nameMeanings.name: Sara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

variants.name: Sarah
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

en.lifeSummary: When Sara Samuelsdotter was born in 1440, in Linköping, Östergötland, Sweden, her father, Samuel Samuelsson, was 25 and her mother, Anna Maria Johnsdotter, was 19. She married John Wyllie in 1452, in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 24 May 1513, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Aberdeen, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sara Samuelsdotter est née en 1440, à Linköping, Östergötland, Suède, son père, Samuel Samuelsson, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anna Maria Johnsdotter, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Wyllie en 1452, à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 24 mai 1513, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Aberdeen, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sara Samuelsdotter 1440 in Linköping, Östergötland, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Samuel Samuelsson 25 und ihre Mutter Anna Maria Johnsdotter 19. Sie hat 1452 in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom John Wyllie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 24. Mai 1513 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Aberdeen, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sara Samuelsdotter è nata il nel 1440 nel Linköping, Östergötland, Svezia, sua padre, Samuel Samuelsson, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Anna Maria Johnsdotter, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Wyllie nel 1452, nel Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 24 maggio 1513, nel Carlisle, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Aberdeen, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sara Samuelsdotterが1440年にスウェーデンoステルグoトランドリンクoパングで生まれた時，父Samuel Samuelssonは25歳，母Anna Maria Johnsdotterは19歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーでJohn Wyllieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1513年5月24日にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルで73歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sara Samuelsdotter(이)가 1440년 스웨덴 o스터그o틀랜드 링ko핀그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Samuel Samuelsson(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Maria Johnsdotter(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 토를리에서 John Wyllie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1513년 5월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sara Samuelsdotter nasceu em 1440, em Linköping, Östergötland, Suécia, seu pai, Samuel Samuelsson, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anna Maria Johnsdotter, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Wyllie em 1452, em Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 24 de maio de 1513, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Aberdeen, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sara Samuelsdotter родилась в 1440 г. в местности линкoпинг, oстиргoтланд, Швеция, её отцу по имени Samuel Samuelsson было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Maria Johnsdotter, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Wyllie в 1452 г. в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 24 мая 1513 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности абирдин, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sara Samuelsdotter nació en 1440, en Linköping, Östergötland, Suecia, su papá, Samuel Samuelsson, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anna Maria Johnsdotter, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Wyllie en 1452, en Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1513, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Aberdeen, Escocia, Reino Unido.
